package.name: chess_arm_vision
package.description: Phase-0 move-detection stub for the 6-DOF chess-playing arm. The engine is the authoritative game state; vision only reports which board squares changed each turn (never the piece type). Ships a pure-Python per-square diff library (detector.py) and a thin ROS 2 node that turns ground-truth simulator FENs on /sim_board_fen into a DetectChanges service. Real OpenCV per-square diffing replaces the stub in Phase 3.
